message:
feat(web): replace FastAPI with native HTTP framework types (ft-181uk)

Replace the external FastAPI dependency in web_framework.rs with ~500 lines
of purpose-built native HTTP types built on asupersync primitives:

- StatusCode: struct with OK/BAD_REQUEST/INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR/SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
- Method: enum with Get variant
- QueryString: parse() + get() for query parameter lookup
- Request: typed extensions (TypeMap), method/path/query/headers access
- Response: json()/with_status()/header()/body()/internal_error() builders
- ResponseBody: Bytes and stream() variants
- ControlFlow: Continue/Break(Response) for middleware
- Middleware trait: before/after hooks with BoxFuture returns
- App + AppBuilder: route registration with method/path/handler dispatch
- TcpServer: lightweight accept loop on asupersync::net::TcpListener
- FrameworkWebRuntime: start/shutdown/finish lifecycle matching prior API
- HTTP request parsing via httparse crate (zero-alloc header parsing)
- HTTP response serialization with proper status lines and headers

All consumer code (web/router.rs, web/middleware.rs, web/handlers.rs,
web/extractors.rs, web/error.rs, web/sse.rs) continues to compile unchanged
against the native API surface. The FastAPI dep is still present in Cargo.toml
(will be removed once MCP framework is also replaced in a follow-up slice).

14 unit tests covering StatusCode, QueryString, Request extensions,
Response serialization, ControlFlow, and helper functions.

Compiles clean with --features web and --all-features (0 errors, 0 warnings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -82,6 +82,7 @@ fastmcp = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 toon_rust = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 # Web server (optional, behind feature)
 fastapi = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+httparse = { version = "1", optional = true }
 # Sync (optional, behind feature)
 asupersync = { workspace = true, optional = true, features = ["tls"] }
 # Distributed mode (optional, behind feature)
@@ -498,7 +499,7 @@ vendored = ["frankenterm"]  # backward compat alias
 browser = ["browser-automation"]
 mcp = ["mcp-server"]
 mcp-client = ["dep:fastmcp"]
-web = ["dep:fastapi", "dep:asupersync"]
+web = ["dep:fastapi", "dep:asupersync", "dep:httparse"]
 streaming = ["web"]
 tui = ["dep:ratatui", "dep:crossterm"]
 ftui = ["dep:ftui"]
